headline: Here are the 30,000 songs Sony is suing Udio’s AI music generator over
summary: Sony Music is suing AI music generator Udio. The lawsuit claims copyright infringement of over 30,000 songs. Hits from Elvis, Beyoncé, and Harry Styles are cited.

headline: The FCC is planning to retroactively ban disguised DJI gadgets
summary: The FCC plans to retroactively ban previously approved gadgets. This targets 'DJI front companies' suspected of evading rules. The move will crack down on disguised DJI drones and cameras.

headline: The Odyssey turned me into an IMAX believer
summary: Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey' initially left the author conflicted. Two fantastical scenes felt slightly 'off' to the eye. The IMAX experience ultimately made the author a believer.

headline: SpaceX in your index fund, explained
summary: Index funds are typically seen as safe investments. High-risk company SpaceX is being fast-tracked into the Nasdaq-100. This raises questions about the changing risk profile of index funds.

headline: Leon Kennedy Voice Actor Says Metallica, Nirvana Helped Shape His Performance for the Resident Evil Character
summary: Nick Apostolides, Leon Kennedy's voice actor, revealed his inspirations. Metallica and Nirvana influenced his Resident Evil character portrayal. Surprising musical choices shaped his performance.

headline: Kingdom Hearts Missing-Link Leak Has Fans Wishing Square Enix Hadn't Canceled Its Mobile Spinoff
summary: Leaked footage of Kingdom Hearts Missing-Link has emerged online. It appears to be a nearly finished intro for the canceled mobile game. Fans expressed regret over Square Enix's decision to cancel it.

headline: Nier Creator Yoko Taro Mourns Death of Physical Media as PlayStation Plans to End Production of Game Discs
summary: Nier creator Yoko Taro laments the decline of physical media. PlayStation plans to halt game disc production by January 2028. Taro expressed concerns about the future of physical games on social media.

headline: Pick Up a Powerful and Infinitely Reusable Cordless Electric Air Duster for $19 After Coupon
summary: Get a powerful, cordless electric air duster for just $19. Use a special coupon to grab this reusable cleaning tool. Your dusty PC will thank you for this purchase.

headline: Chris Mason: Cull of Starmer allies as new chancellor faces crunching spending choices
summary: BBC political editor Chris Mason details a 'cull' of Starmer allies. John Healey's appointment as chancellor is highlighted as particularly significant. The new chancellor faces difficult spending decisions ahead.

headline: Who's in Andy Burnham's cabinet?
summary: An in-depth look at Andy Burnham's new cabinet. Labour MPs have been appointed to various key roles. The article details the composition of the new Prime Minister's government.

headline: Trump slaps 50% tariffs on Canada and Carney vows to 'intensify' trade talks
summary: Trump has imposed a 50% tariff on Canada. This marks a significant escalation in trade tensions. Carney has vowed to intensify trade talks to address the duties.

headline: US launches fresh strikes on Iran, as Trump warns of retaliation for deaths of soldiers
summary: The US has launched new strikes against Iran. Attacks aimed to degrade Iran's capabilities in the Strait of Hormuz. Trump warned of retaliation following the deaths of soldiers.
